title: My Profile
languageHint: Choose the interface language. Monetary values remain in Brazilian Real (BRL).

affiliate.linkedNote: This link is permanent and cannot be changed.
affiliate.explain: Were you referred by someone? Enter their referral code. The link is unique and permanent — it cannot be changed later.
affiliate.disabledHint: You cannot link a referral code once the subscription becomes active. This only becomes available again on a future renewal.
affiliate.confirmLink: Link the code "{{code}}" to your account? This link is permanent and cannot be undone or changed later.
affiliate.toastError: This code could not be linked.
affiliate.toastErrorDesc: Check that it is correct and try again.

sub.subscribeToPlan: Subscribe to a plan to keep using

phoneCard.realAccountRequired: SMS verification requires signing in to a real account (Firebase). Demo accounts cannot verify their phone.
phoneCard.smsHint: We will send a 6-digit code by SMS to confirm the number.
